B) Formation of citrate from the acetyl
coenzyme A
C) Formation of citrate from
decarboxylation of succinic acid
D) None of the above
59. Which enzyme catalyses the first step of
TCA cycle? (Pg 231, E)
A) Citrate Synthase
B) Citrate Reductase
C) Citrate Oxidase
D) None of the above
60. What is the first member of TCA cycle that
accepts Acetyl CoA? (Pg 231, E)
A) Citrate
B) CoA
C) Oxaloacetic acid
D) Both A and C
61. Which among the following is synthesised
during the conversion of succinyl — CoA to
succinic acid in TCA cycle? (Pg 232, E)
A) FADH, B) GTP
C) NADH, D) ATP
62. How many total CO2 molecule are released
from Pyruvate to completion of TCA cycle?
(Pg 232, E)
A)O B) 1
C)2 D) 3
63. How many total NADH: are produced from
pyruvate to completion of TCA cycle?
(Pg 232, E)
A) 2 B) 3
C) 4 D) 5
64. How many FADH:2 are produced in TCA
cycle? (Pg 232, E)
A) 1 B) 2
C)3 D) 4
65. One molecule of glucose synthesizes how
many molecules of NADH + H* at the end
of TCA cycle? (Pg 232, E)
A) 6 B) 7
C)8 D) 10
66. How many molecules of FADH2 are yielded
from one glucose molecule at the end of
TCA cycle? (Pg 232, E)
A) 1 B) 2
C)3 D) 4
